## Key Themes Anticipated

1. **One-to-Many / Platform Selling** — Stage presentation architecture, group closing
2. **Direct Response Copywriting** — Headlines, bullets, USP, openings, CTAs
3. **Sales Psychology** — Mind control, persuasion, storytelling in copy
4. **Affluent Marketing** — Selling to high-net-worth individuals
5. **Magnetic Marketing** — Lead generation, attraction-based marketing (2014)
6. **List Building** — Direct mail, email, multi-medium list strategies
7. **Cash Flow** — Revenue surge tactics, immediate monetization
8. **Time Leverage** — No B.S. time management philosophy
